page_content:
NEUR Research Credit

NEUR379: Neuroscience Research⁸ ⁹[1-3c]

NEUR479: Neuroscience Research Lab¹⁰ [1-3c]

Notes:

⁵ Students may not use both ANSC327 and BSCI222/HLSC322 toward filling Neuroscience track requirements. BSCI222/HLSC322 will not count as a Neuroscience Advanced Program Lab.

⁶ Special & Selected Topics courses are allowed if approved for upper level courses in NEUR. See the NEUR website for a full list of pre- approved courses or speak with your advisor for new courses.

⁷ Permission for regular-term KNES courses are requested through your academic advisor. Permissions are granted at the discretion of KNES dept.

⁸ NEUR379, with permission, may be substituted with BSCI399, BSCI399H, BSCI399L, PSYC479, PSYC468H, PSYC499H.

⁹ 3 credits earned in the same lab (can be over the course of multiple semesters) can count towards the 15 credit NEUR Track Course requirement, but will not count towards a specific track.

¹⁰ NEUR479 can count as a NEUR Advanced Program Lab (but not as a track course), with a minimum of 3 credits and submission of research product to the NEUR Research Coordinator.
